caption: A man with a beard is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, a gold chain, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold across the chest. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. He holds a small, thin white object in his hands and looks toward someone off-camera to his right, speaking with a slight smile. Behind him, a white backdrop features repeated "HUSTLE" text and stars, and a sign above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black box and a blue and red container with "TALK OUT" text are on the desk. Across the frames, the man's posture and expression remain nearly identical, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression and the slight movement of his hands as he speaks, indicating a continuous shot of a conversation.
